title: Zhan Shen: Fanchen Shenyu II

synonyms: 斩神之凡尘神域 第2季
I Learn To Kill Gods in an Asylum
Wo Zai Jingshenbing Yuan Xue Zhan Shen

synopsis:
After the crisis in Cangnan was resolved, Lin Qiye completed a one-year Night Watcher training and assessment at Jinnan Mountain, officially becoming a Night Watcher. He then returned to Team 136 and, together with his teammates, began a new battle against the Ancient God Church… New evil gods from the West appear, humanity’s strongest fighters gather in Cangnan, and a massive disaster is quietly taking shape.

(Source: WeTV)
